series_metadata.series_description: All records pertaining to the issuance of bonds, including, but not limited to, applications, financial statements, reports, employee reports, annual reports, legal transcripts, notice of intent, notice of issuance, correspondence, ongoing audits and other records filed with and related to the bond issue.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: three (3) years maturity or satisfaction of all obligations Records subject audit shall be further retained audit report is released and discrepancies addressed. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
